  • Constructor Details

    • ResourceBundleMessageProvider

      public ResourceBundleMessageProvider(@NotNull @NotNull ConfigData configData)

  • Method Details

    • provide

      @NotNull public @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.text.Component provide(@NotNull @NotNull String key, @Nullable @Nullable Locale locale, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component... args)
      Description copied from interface: MessageProvider
      Provides a message to the user with the given key in the given locale. If the locale is null, the system's default Locale is used.
      Specified by:
      provide in interface MessageProvider
      Parameters:
      key - an unique key identifying the message to provide.
      locale - the locale in whose language the message should be provided.
      args - additional components that fill in placeholders in the message.
      Returns:
      the translated and formatted message.

    • provide

      @NotNull public @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.text.Component provide(@NotNull @NotNull String key, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component... args)
      Description copied from interface: MessageProvider
      Provides a TranslatableComponent containing the message specified by the given key. This does not need a locale as it is determined by the server when sending the [TranslatableComponent] to the client.
      Specified by:
      provide in interface MessageProvider
      Parameters:
      key - an unique key identifying the message to provide.
      args - additional components that fill in placeholders in the message.
      Returns:
      the formatted message ready to be translated to the user.

    • internalError

      @NotNull public @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.text.Component internalError(@Nullable @Nullable Locale locale)
      Description copied from interface: MessageProvider
      Provides a message to the user describing that an internal error occurred while executing a command. The message is prefixed depending on the value of MessageProvider.autoPrefixed().
      Specified by:
      internalError in interface MessageProvider
      Parameters:
      locale - the locale in whose language the message should be provided. If locale is null, the system's default Locale is used.
      Returns:
      the translated message stating the occurrence of an internal error.

    • internalError

      @NotNull public @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.text.Component internalError()
      Description copied from interface: MessageProvider
      Provides a message to the user describing that an internal error occurred while executing a command. The message is prefixed depending on the value of MessageProvider.autoPrefixed(). It is translated when sent to the user as a TranslatableComponent.
      Specified by:
      internalError in interface MessageProvider
      Returns:
      an translatable component stating the occurrence of an internal error.

    • prefix

      @NotNull public @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.text.Component prefix()
      Description copied from interface: MessageProvider
      Provides this system's prefix to display in front of messages.
      Specified by:
      prefix in interface MessageProvider
      Returns:
      the prefix component

    • autoPrefixed

      public boolean autoPrefixed()
      Specified by:
      autoPrefixed in interface MessageProvider
      Returns:
      whether this message provider automatically prefixes messages.

    • unprefixedProvider

      public MessageProvider unprefixedProvider()
      Description copied from interface: MessageProvider
      Returns a new message provider that does not prefix messages.
      Specified by:
      unprefixedProvider in interface MessageProvider
      Returns:
      a new message provider that does not prefix messages.
